prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约3235名、4655名、6757名、5794名、7670名，整体呈大幅后移趋势，近3年累计后移约1915名；2025年基准约7670名，为近 年最高位次（最难进）；本省物理类计划2021–2023年均为28人，2024年降至26人，2025年增至32人；2026年计划32人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招效应。\ n211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第56名，近年排名稳定在50–56区间，属全国顶尖政法类院校。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年高考周期声誉评 价偏负面，主要涉及早年校园安全事件，对报考心理有一定抑制；抖音热度排名第6（高热），综合曝光量高，反映考生关注度持续旺盛；法学为A+学科（全国 顶级），是该校核心王牌专业，对物理类高分考生同样吸引力极强；其余招生专业如应用心理学、经济学、工商管理等未单独获评A类学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学大类热 度2024年转为分化观望，社会舆论对法学就业竞争加剧存在讨论；本省2026年物理类考生约203930人，较2025年192096人增加约6.2%，竞争加剧；学校位于北京市，属跨省报考；福建物理类考生赴京就读需考虑地域偏好，北京高校对福建考生整体吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次 7670名、2026年招生计划持平、本省物理类考生增加约6.2%以及抖音高热关注度，竞争压力总体略增；预测最低位次约7720名，区间7220–8220名。

- 法学（北邮联合培养智慧法学实验班）
- 法学（经济学双学士学位项目）
- 法学（涉外法治人才培养实验班）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间7220–8220名内，建议以二档专业为主、一档王牌法学实验班冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如7400名以内）可重点冲击法学实验班等一档专业；位次接近区间上限（如8000名以外）应以二档专业为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 3235, 4655, 6757, 5794, and 7670 respectively, showing a significant downward trend overall, with a cumulative decline of about 1915 places in the last three years; the 2025 baseline is about 7670, the highest ranking in recent years (most difficult to enter); the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 28 from 2021 to 2023, dropped to 26 in 2024, and increased to 32 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 32, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction effect.\n211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science China University Ranking 2026 approximately 56th, with rankings stable in the 50–56 range in recent years, belonging to the top national political science and law institutions.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving early campus safety incidents, which have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking 6th (high heat), with high overall exposure, reflecting sustained strong attention from candidates; Law is an A+ discipline (top in the country), the core flagship major of the school, which also strongly attracts high-scoring Physics Category candidates; other enrollment majors such as Applied Psychology, Economics, Business Administration, etc., have not individually received A-class discipline ratings.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of the Law major category turned to differentiation and wait-and-see in 2024, with social discussions on intensified competition in law employment; the province's 2026 Physics Category candidates are approximately 203,930, an increase of about 6.2% from 192,096 in 2025, intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, involving cross-province application; Fujian Physics Category candidates studying in Beijing need to consider regional preferences, and Beijing universities have a strong overall appeal to Fujian candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7670, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged, a provincial Physics Category candidate increase of about 6.2%, and high Douyin attention, competitive pressure is slightly increased overall; predicted minimum ranking approximately 7720, with a range of 7220–8220.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7220–8220, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 flagship Law experimental classes as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 7400), focus on impacting Tier 1 majors like Law experimental classes; for rankings near the upper limit (e.g., beyond 8000), choose Tier 2 majors as a safe option.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 994, 734, 753, 1006, and 1086 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 333 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 1086, the highest ranking in recent years (most difficult to enter); the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 33 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 38 in 2024, and significantly increased to 50 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 48, a slight reduction of 4% compared to 2025, easing competition slightly but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 56th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 50–56 range in recent years, belonging to the top national political and legal institutions; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving early campus safety incidents, which have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology; ranked 6th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high overall exposure, reflecting sustained strong attention from candidates; Law is an A+ discipline (national top level), the core flagship major of the school, extremely attractive to high-scoring candidates; other enrolled majors such as Sociology, Political Science, Chinese Language and Literature, etc., have not individually received A-class discipline ratings.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of the Law major category in 2024 has turned to differentiation and wait-and-see, with social discussions on intensified competition in legal employment; the number of provincial History Category candidates in 2026 is about 63,970, an increase of about 6.2% compared to 60,252 in 2025, intensifying competition; the school is located in Beijing, a cross-province application; Fujian candidates studying in Beijing need to consider regional preferences, and Beijing universities have a strong overall appeal to Fujian candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1086, a slight 4% reduction in the 2026 plan, an increase of about 6.2% in provincial History Category candidates, and high Douyin attention, competitive pressure generally increases slightly; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1080, with a range of 885–1275.
